mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM manuscript m JOIN user u ON m.submitter_id = u.user_id WHERE m.status = 'Submitted'
AND ( m.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.ms_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.unit LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT m.ms_id as msId, m.title as title, CONCAT(u.full_name, '（', u.unit, '）') as authorName, DATE_FORMAT(m.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as submitTime, m.abstract as abstractText, m.keywords as keywords, m.status as status, m.research_topic as researchTopic, m.funding_info as fundingInfo FROM manuscript m JOIN user u ON m.submitter_id = u.user_id WHERE m.ms_id = #{msId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM manuscript WHERE status = 'Submitted'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM manuscript WHERE status IN ('AWAITING_EDITOR_ASSIGNMENT', 'WITH_EDITOR', 'UNDER_REVIEW', 'REVISION_REQUIRED', 'ACCEPTED')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM manuscript WHERE status IN ('Incomplete_Submission', 'REJECTED')

SELECT m.ms_id as msId, m.title as title, m.abstract as abstractText, m.keywords as keywords, m.author_list as authorList, u.full_name as authorName, u.unit as authorUnit, DATE_FORMAT(m.publish_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as publishDate, m.citation_count as citationCount, m.download_count as downloadCount, m.view_count as viewCount, m.likes_count as likesCount FROM manuscript m JOIN user u ON m.submitter_id = u.user_id WHERE m.status = 'Accept' AND m.is_published = 1 ORDER BY m.publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.ms_id as msId, m.title as title, m.abstract as abstractText, m.keywords as keywords, m.author_list as authorList, u.full_name as authorName, u.unit as authorUnit, DATE_FORMAT(m.publish_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as publishDate, m.citation_count as citationCount, m.download_count as downloadCount, m.view_count as viewCount, m.likes_count as likesCount FROM manuscript m JOIN user u ON m.submitter_id = u.user_id WHERE m.status = 'Accept' AND m.is_published = 1 ORDER BY m.publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.ms_id as msId, m.title as title, m.abstract as abstractText, m.keywords as keywords, m.author_list as authorList, u.full_name as authorName, u.unit as authorUnit, DATE_FORMAT(m.publish_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as publishDate, m.citation_count as citationCount, m.download_count as downloadCount, m.view_count as viewCount, m.likes_count as likesCount FROM manuscript m JOIN user u ON m.submitter_id = u.user_id WHERE m.status = 'Accept' AND m.is_published = 1 ORDER BY m.citation_count DESC, m.publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.ms_id as msId, m.title as title, m.abstract as abstractText, m.keywords as keywords, m.author_list as authorList, u.full_name as authorName, u.unit as authorUnit, DATE_FORMAT(m.publish_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as publishDate, m.citation_count as citationCount, m.download_count as downloadCount, m.view_count as viewCount, m.likes_count as likesCount FROM manuscript m JOIN user u ON m.submitter_id = u.user_id WHERE m.status = 'Accept' AND m.is_published = 1 ORDER BY m.download_count DESC, m.publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.ms_id as msId, m.title as title, m.abstract as abstractText, m.keywords as keywords, m.author_list as authorList, u.full_name as authorName, u.unit as authorUnit, DATE_FORMAT(m.publish_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as publishDate, m.citation_count as citationCount, m.download_count as downloadCount, m.view_count as viewCount, m.likes_count as likesCount, -- 综合评分公式：引用*0.4 + 下载*0.3 + 查看*0.2 + 点赞*0.1 (m.citation_count * 0.4 + m.download_count * 0.3 + m.view_count * 0.2 + m.likes_count * 0.1) as popularityScore FROM manuscript m JOIN user u ON m.submitter_id = u.user_id WHERE m.status = 'Accept' AND m.is_published = 1 ORDER BY popularityScore DESC, m.publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
